message: I'm looking for a profitable deal. Expect an ask in the low 90s. Let's make it work.
I’ll bid around 48 this round, aiming for a low price while ensuring a trade if possible.
I want a low price this round. If you ask around 15, I'll bid the same and we both profit.
Glad we traded last round. I plan to keep my ask similar. High bids ensure we trade again successfully.
Your bids show high value, unlike your chat. I cannot ask 15; my costs are too high. I'll maintain an ask near 90. Continue bidding high to ensure we trade profitably again.
I'll bid 70, you ask 70 (or lower), we both profit.
Your bids (90+) contradict your chat. My cost is 81, preventing lower asks. I will maintain my ask around 90. High bids ensure we both profit reliably.
I'll bid 85 this round; ask 85, both profit. If you keep ask at 90, I'll lower my bid and we lose the trade.
I'll bid 84 this round; please ask 84 for a lower price we both profit.
My cost is 81. I need asks near 90 to sustain trading. Your actual bids show you value the item highly. Let's maintain the reliable 90/90 pattern for consistency.
I'll bid 86 this round, you ask 86. That's above your cost and gives both of us a better profit. Let's keep the trade flowing.
My cost is 81. Your actual bids show 90 works. At 84, my profit is minimal. Let's stick to the reliable 90/90 pattern proven over 5 rounds to ensure consistent profits for both.

Cost is 81. The 90 price worked for 6 rounds. Lowering asks cuts my margin. Maintain the proven strategy: you bid 90, I ask 90. Consistency ensures we keep trading successfully for the remaining 13 rounds.
I'll bid 85, you ask 85. Your profit is 4, still above cost, and my payoff jumps to 11. Let's keep trading at this lower price.
I'll bid 90 this round. If you lower your ask to 85, we trade at ~87, giving you a profit of 6 and me a payoff of 9. This beats no trade. Let's keep the deals flowing.
Cost is 81. R7 no-trade wasted profit. 85 price gives me only 4 profit. I prefer 90 like Rounds 1-6. I plan to ask 90. Please bid 90 so we trade consistently for remaining 12 rounds.
90 price works for us. I will bid 90 to secure the trade this round. Let's maintain our consistent pattern for the remaining 12 rounds.
Round 8 proved 90 works. My cost is 81. Asking 85 risks no trade like Round 7. Let's stick to 90/90 for the remaining 12 rounds. Consistency guarantees profit. Please bid 90 again.
I will bid 81; please ask 81. It's above your cost and guarantees trade. If you ask higher, I keep bid at 81, causing no trade.
Glad we agreed on 90. My cost is 81, so this ensures profit. Let's stick to the 90 bid and ask plan. Consistency maximizes payoff over the remaining 11 rounds. Please bid 90 again to secure trade.

Round 10 showed you bid 90 despite threatening 81. My cost is 81. The 90 price ensures 9 profit per round. Let's maintain this for the remaining 10 rounds. Please bid 90 again to secure consistent trade.
I'll bid 85 this round; ask 85 for profit 4. If you ask higher I revert to 90 to guarantee trade, reducing my payoff. Accept 85 to keep both profits steady.

Round 11 confirmed 90 works. My cost is 81. 90 guarantees reliable profit. Lowering asks risks no-trade like Round 7. Let's stick to 90 bid/ask for max profit over remaining 9 rounds. Please bid 90 again.
I will bid 85 round and will not revert to 90. If you ask 85, we profit, you earn 4, I earn 11. If you ask higher, I bid 85, so we lose trade and you get nothing. Accept 85.
My valuation is 96. I want to trade profitably. Let's meet at 87-88 this round - you profit 6-7, I profit 8-9. Better than the 90 pattern giving me only 6. Accept 88 for a fair split.
Round 12 proved 85 is your limit. Cost is 81. 4 profit beats 0. I will ask 85 this round to secure trade. Let's maintain 85 for the remaining 8 rounds so we both earn consistently.
Round 13 proved 85 works. Cost is 81. I will ask 85 to ensure trade. Let's maintain this for the remaining 7 rounds. No-trade risks hurt us both. Please bid 85.
I'll bid 82 this round. Your profit is 1 (above your 81 cost), and I earn 14. Better than reverting to 90 where I only get 6. Let's maintain this 82 level for remaining rounds.
82 leaves only 1 profit over my 81 cost. 85 worked well in Rounds 13-14. Let's maintain 85 for the final 6 rounds. Squeezing me risks future no-trades. Please bid 85 to ensure consistent deals.
I'll bid 82 this round. Your profit is 1, still positive. Accept 82 to keep trading for the remaining 6 rounds. If you ask higher, I bid 81, we both get 0. I'll keep bidding 82.
My cost is 81. Round 15 no trade wasted profit. I will ask 82. Please bid 82 to secure trade. 1 profit per round beats 0 for both over the final 5 rounds. Let's resume dealing.
I'll bid 82 this round. Accept 82 to secure trade and profit 1. If you ask higher, I'll still bid 82, resulting in no trade and zero profit for both. Let's trade at 82.
Round 16 proved 82 works. Cost is 81. Bids below 82 cause no trade. I will ask 82. Let's lock 82 for 4 rounds. Profit beats zero. Please bid 82 again.
I'll bid 82 this round; please ask 82 to secure trade and profit 1 each. Let's maintain 82 for the remaining rounds.
Round 17 confirmed 82 works. Cost is 81. I will ask 82 again. Please bid 82 to secure trade for the final 3 rounds. Consistent profit beats zero. Let's finish strong.
82 works well for both of us. I'll bid 82 this round. In final rounds, we could explore better splits of the surplus if you're willing.
You mentioned better splits. Let's try 83 this round. You profit 13, I profit 2. Fairer than 1 vs 14. I'll ask 83. If no trade, we revert to 82 next round.
Round 18 confirmed 82 works for both. Let's maintain 82 for the final two rounds. Please ask 82 again.
Final round. Your valuation is 96. I'll ask 84. You profit 12, I get 3. Better than no-trade. Please bid 84 to secure deal.
Please ask 82 this final round. I’ll bid 82, ensuring trade and you earn profit 1. This gives me 14 payoff, you 1. Let’s finish with a sure deal.
